title: Donut Homes
description: Donut Homes recreates Donut SMP-style homes with a clean GUI, colored names, and fixed home slots. It includes /home /sethome /delhome warmup teleporting, and movement cancellation.
body:
🏠 DonutSMP-Homes
DonutSMP-Homes is a polished Paper/Spigot homes plugin inspired by the Donut SMP home system.
It adds a clean inventory-based homes menu, colored home names, fixed home slots, teleport warmups, movement cancellation, and simple file-based storage.

✨ Features
🏡 Home System
Set homes using /sethome <name>
Open the homes menu using /home
Teleport directly using /home <name>
Delete homes using /delhome <name>
Homes are saved per-player
Each player has fixed home slots
New homes are placed in the nearest free slot
🎨 Colored Home Names
Supports legacy & color codes
Example: &bBase, &4&lVault, &aFarm
If no color is used, homes display in the default blue style
Colored names are supported in the GUI and tab-completion
📦 Donut SMP-Style GUI
Inventory homes menu
Fixed home slots
Empty slots show a “No Home Set” item
Saved homes use blue bed items
Delete buttons update depending on whether a home exists
GUI styling is inspired by the Donut SMP homes menu
⏳ Teleport Warmup
5-second teleport delay
Action bar countdown
Note block sounds during teleporting
Teleport is cancelled if the player moves
Villager-style cancel sound when movement cancels teleport
💾 Storage
Homes are stored in homes.yml
Saves world, x, y, z, yaw, and pitch
No database setup required
Lightweight and simple to manage
